human_review_reason: The verification is conclusive: this is a listing_page with no substantive content. Rule 5 explicitly requires rejection of listing pages. The generated record already correctly identifies this as non-archivable. No ambiguity exists that requires human judgment - the record should be rejected and each linked FOMC statement archived separately.

corrected_fields.summary: This Federal Reserve webpage is a navigation index listing links to all FOMC statements and projection materials released during 2021 (January, March, April, June, July, September, November, and December). It does not contain the actual FOMC statement text or substantive policy content—only references to separate linked documents.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source cannot serve as a standalone archive record because it contains no substantive policy text. It is a directory page requiring navigation to individual linked documents to access actual FOMC statements. For archival purposes, each linked statement should be processed separately.
